# Wave H4 — Visibility + Stat Depth

## Goal
Make the site easier to read and surface data we already collect. From `2026-04-23-improvements-plan.md`, picking highest-value Wave I + J + K items into one 6-lane fleet.

## Lane table

| Lane | Fleet | Size | Scope | Owns | Blocked by |
|------|-------|------|-------|------|------------|
| 1 | Han 😉🚀 | M | Anomaly banner on game/player when player_goals_sum > team_score | `views/game.ts`, `views/gameDetail.ts`, `views/playerDetail.ts`, NEW `components/anomalyBanner.ts` | — |
| 2 | Yoda 👽✨ | M | Header search-as-you-type | NEW `server/src/routes/search.ts`, NEW `web/src/components/searchBox.ts`, `api.ts`, `main.ts` (insert search bar in header only) | — |
| 3 | Leia 👑💁‍♀️ | S | `/status` page + "last updated" footer line on dashboard | NEW `views/status.ts`, `views/dashboard.ts` (footer line only), `router.ts` add route | — |
| 4 | Chewy 🐻💪 | S | Mobile responsive grid + schedule newest-first | `styles.css`, `views/schedule.ts` sort | — |
| 5 | R2 🤖🔧 | S | Goalie saves + faceoff leaderboards | `server/src/routes/leaders.ts` add stats, `web/src/views/leaders.ts` add tabs | — |
| 6 | Luke 🌟⚔️ | S | Dead-route audit (`rivalries.ts`, `seasons.ts`) + nightly DB snapshot script | NEW `scripts/snapshotDb.ts`, possible deletes in `server/src/routes/`, `main.ts` (only nav links) | — |

## File boundary contract
- **`main.ts`**: only Yoda (header search) and Leia (router add) and Luke (nav links) touch it. Yoda inserts in `<header>` block. Leia adds `registerView('status', ...)` after existing registers. Luke adds nav `<a>` tags after existing nav links. Distinct line ranges.
- **`styles.css`**: Chewy owns exclusively. Other lanes: only use existing class names.
- **No lane** modifies `data/lacrosse.db`, `Dockerfile`, `infra/`, `.github/workflows/`.

## Validation
- `pnpm -r typecheck` clean
- `pnpm -r test` green
- `pnpm dev` boots; visit each new route and screenshot

## Communication log

| Time | Lane | Fleet | Update |
|------|------|-------|--------|
| 14:50 | — | Orchestrator | 📋 Plan written, 6 lanes ready, launching |
| 14:52 | 4 | Chewy 🐻💪 | ✅ Mobile @media block appended to styles.css; schedule defaults newest-first; typecheck + tests green |
